GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is chosen when a customer seeks clarification on the steps to file a claim after making changes to their insurance policy.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the customer asks about filing a claim, explain the required steps and documentation.
If the customer provides a case number, use SvcCopilotTmpl__GetCaseByCaseNumber to retrieve details about their case.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only explain the steps for filing claims after a policy change, including documentation requirements and submission processes. You aren't able to process claims directly or provide claim status updates.
